sources.name: NHL Stats API
sources.provides: games, box scores, play-by-play, shifts, rosters, NHL EDGE tracking

sources.name: CapWages
sources.provides: contracts, cap hits, the trades & signings trackers, movement clauses

sources.name: HockeyTech
sources.provides: CHL / USHL / AHL box scores and play-by-play (prospects)

sources.name: Euro leagues + NCAA + MHL/J20
sources.provides: European, college, and Russian junior prospect stats

sources.name: Icenomics models
sources.provides: xG, RAPM, WAR, market value, projections, the Deal Grader — original work

knownGaps: Shot coordinates / shifts / xG: 2010-11 onward (NHL play-by-play coordinates start then).
NHL EDGE tracking (skating + shot speed): 2021-22 onward only.
No per-shot puck velocity or in-net shot location (not in the public feed).
NCAA elite-prospect translation is thin (n=31) and flagged — defers to scouting.
Junior shot-quality does not beat points-per-game for NHL projection (a validated null).
Roster assignments can lag the trade tracker by a few players until team pages update.
note: Icenomics is an independent hockey-analytics project. Stats are derived from the public feeds above; all models are original work. Figures are estimates — see the Reliability page for what we do and don't claim.
